title: Colorful Campfires
description: This is a simple polymer mod that introduces vibrant, colorful campfires
body:
This simple yet fun mod lets you bring some color into your Minecraft world! 

Right-click a **campfire** with any dye in your hand, and it will instantly change to the color of that **dye**. Now, every campfire can shine in a rainbow of colors, adding a vibrant touch to your builds and outdoor adventures. Perfect for creative **decoration** or just having fun with friends!

![colorful_campfires](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3c477dc0285e7a79eedfc508f510c55a4117b6ef.png)
